documentation.description:
Large debug/prototyping array. The message uses the maximum available
payload for data. The array_id and name fields are used to discriminate
between messages in code and in user interfaces (respectively). Do not use
in production code.

record_types.name: Debug_Float_Array

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name, for human-friendly display in a Ground Control Station

fields.name: Array_Id
fields.description: Unique ID used to discriminate between arrays
